title: ExtraEmily banned on Twitch after a near crash changes her latest livestream
summary_full: ExtraEmily has been banned from Twitch after a June 28 IRL stream showed her nearly crashing while reading chat during a drive. The incident revived concerns about distracted driving and followed previous controversies, including a viewbotting dispute and an earlier driving-related suspension. The latest ban has again sparked debate over safety rules for livestreamers and the responsibility creators have while broadcasting in public.
